response.justification: While Bogdan is a skilled, versatile engineer with strong testing practices and full-stack capability, he falls significantly short on the core technical requirements for this role. He has only ~1-2 years of C++ experience (job requires 8), limited focus on large-scale infrastructure or cloud architecture (despite some AWS CDK exposure), and minimal technical leadership experience in cloud/DevOps contexts. His career trajectory is primarily full-stack web and backend development, not the infrastructure specialization this platform role demands.
strengths: Exceptional breadth across web, mobile, embedded systems, and diverse languages demonstrates adaptability and systems thinking
Strong emphasis on testing practices, TDD, and code quality (created testing frameworks, mentored on testing methods) aligns with establishing engineering best practices
Proven ability to architect and launch products end-to-end, plus experience at scale (Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
concerns: Critical C++ deficit: only ~1-2 years of substantial C++ work versus the 8 years required; career is primarily TypeScript, JavaScript, and D
Limited infrastructure and cloud architecture focus; AWS CDK exposure is surface-level compared to the production-grade cloud platform architecture this role demands
Minimal technical leadership track record; only ~1 year in an explicit Staff role without clear evidence of mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
